spec_match.rationale: The page now describes the current drawElementImage() API, marks the source card with layoutsubtree, and detects drawElementImage() before older prototype aliases.

interactive.rationale: The generator has live text inputs, theme swatches, card-size selection, padding control, forced fallback mode, render action, and PNG download.

blurb_alignment.rationale: The concept lede aligns with the feature's DOM-subtree-to-canvas behavior and clearly distinguishes native rendering from fallback drawing.

edge_cases.rationale: The capability note and forced fallback checkbox expose unsupported-origin-trial behavior as a visible, repeatable edge case.

references.rationale: A labelled references section includes chromestatus.com/feature/5172548013916160 and the WHATWG HTML pull request.

design_system.rationale: Raw hex theme values were replaced with CSS-variable themes, and canvas fallback colors resolve those design-system variables.

summary: Social Card Generator now clears the major missing-reference finding and the related moderate findings with current API naming, stronger controls, explicit fallback simulation, labelled references, and CSS-variable theming.
